macro.title: Kevin Warsh confirmed as Fed chair as mortgage lenders look for stability
macro.what: The Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh on Wednesday to succeed Jerome Powell as chairman of the Federal Reserve, sparking hopes within the mortgage industry for less volatility as Warsh
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Fed in Wait-and-See Mode on Hot Inflation Report; Mortgage Rates to Track Oil Prices, Mideast Talks
macro.what: Takeaway: A slightly hotter than expected CPI report will keep the Fed on hold and may push officials slightly closer to considering hikes
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Housing demand is concentrating where affordability still works
housing.what: Housing demand in 2026 is concentrating in markets where pricing, affordability and transaction activity remain aligned.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: What real estate agents need to know about HOA governance risk

housing.title: Linkhome signs deal for Mortgage One Group to expand AI-driven lending footprint
housing.what: Linkhome will acquire Mortgage One Group to integrate AI into origination, adding 18-state licenses, eight branches and an $18 million warehouse line of credit.

housing.title: Crypto rewards eye renters who want to save for a down payment
housing.what: MegPrime launched a rent payment rewards program that returns 2% on any property when paid in MP token, and 10% to 20% at partner communities
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Bright MLS adds Compass nationwide listings feed
housing.what: Bright MLS will add Compass nationwide listings feed and Compass will subsidize some subscriptions, with new flexibility coming this summer.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: America’s Housing Market Favors Buyers—But Their Advantage Is Finally Starting to Shrink
